query: SELECT id, connectionId, syncType, syncStatus, customersCreated, customersUpdated, ordersCreated, ordersUpdated, paymentsProcessed, CASE WHEN errorMessage IS NULL THEN 'none' WHEN LENGTH(errorMessage) = 0 THEN 'empty' ELSE SUBSTRING(errorMessage, 1, 80) END as err, startedAt FROM qb_sync_log ORDER BY id ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.d2c4bdf1aaee --database X4Qkp2kKx9JEdEZTkB9mBy --execute SELECT id, connectionId, syncType, syncStatus, customersCreated, customersUpdated, ordersCreated, ordersUpdated, paymentsProcessed, CASE WHEN errorMessage IS NULL THEN 'none' WHEN LENGTH(errorMessage) = 0 THEN 'empty' ELSE SUBSTRING(errorMessage, 1, 80) END as err, startedAt FROM qb_sync_log ORDER BY id ASC;
